flashcards.definition: Find intercepts, determine end behavior, note multiplicity at zeros, plot key points, sketch smoothly.
The point (0, f(0)); found by evaluating the polynomial at x = 0.
Points where f(x) = 0; found by factoring or using the quadratic formula.
Local maxima or minima where the graph changes direction; at most n − 1 for degree n.
Polynomial graphs are continuous with no sharp corners, cusps, or breaks.
